sma.achievement.first-match.title: First Seeds
sma.achievement.first-match.desc: Complete your first game of Saalu Mane Ata.
sma.achievement.first-win.title: A Quiet Victory
sma.achievement.first-win.desc: Win your first game as the local player.
sma.achievement.six-puzzles.title: Pattern Keeper
sma.achievement.six-puzzles.desc: Solve all six Saalu Mane Ata puzzles.
sma.achievement.first-daily.title: Morning Lamp
sma.achievement.steady-rhythm.title: Steady Rhythm
sma.achievement.steady-rhythm.desc: Build a best daily rhythm of three days.
sma.achievement.first-mill.title: The First Line
sma.achievement.first-mill.desc: Close your first mill in a completed game.
sma.achievement.mill-master.title: Mill Master
sma.achievement.mill-master.desc: Close three mills in a single game.
sma.achievement.flying-victory.title: Flight to Victory
sma.achievement.flying-victory.desc: Win a game after entering the three-seed flying phase.
sma.achievement.the-wall.title: The Living Wall
sma.achievement.the-wall.desc: Win by leaving your rival with no legal move.
